Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Cloud Software Developer role at BIOTRONIK. Your focus on Java and Spring Boot for medical device software aligns with my background in high-reliability systems and back-end development.

I currently develop features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, including core eye-tracking technology. On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app using a PostgreSQL database and automated scrapers. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I have experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and SQL databases, which I am ready to apply to your cloud-based clinical workflow solutions. I am impressed by BIOTRONIK's commitment to cardiology advancements and would like to help build the software behind these devices.

Aodren Gloux
aodren.gloux@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/aodren-gloux | github.com/GAodren
